summary: Iteration 10: Comprehensive testing of Four Seasons CRM Dashboard. All backend API tests passed (15/15). Frontend UI tests verified login for both admin (bsanchezcar@gmail.com) and salesperson (benjamin@fshac.com), Dashboard KPIs, Admin Panel, Data tab with 53 leads, status filters, search functionality, and Follow-ups tab. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid='import-xls-btn' attribute for automated testing
Dropdown overlay can intercept clicks on underlying table when left open

passed_tests: Admin login (bsanchezcar@gmail.com / Benja123) - returns token with admin role
Salesperson login (benjamin@fshac.com / test123) - returns token with salesperson role
Invalid login credentials correctly rejected with 401
Registration rejects invalid domain emails (only @fshac.com or @gmail.com allowed)
Admin Panel: Global Overview shows totals - 53 leads, 22 closed, $216,906 revenue, 41.5% closing rate
Admin Panel: Salesperson comparison table shows Benjamin S. Cardarelli with correct stats
Admin Panel: User management table shows both users with correct roles
Salesperson blocked from admin endpoints with 403
Dashboard KPIs show real data (not 0) for both admin and salesperson
Data tab: Shows 53 leads with 'All Periods' selected
Data tab: Search by name works (e.g., 'Alex' returns 1 result)
Data tab: Status filter SALE shows 22 rows
Data tab: Status filter PENDING shows 20 rows
Data tab: Status filter LOST shows 11 rows
Data tab: Import XLS button is present
Follow-ups tab: Shows follow-up leads with pipeline
Logout button works and returns to login page
Admin tab visible only for admin users
Salesperson dashboard does NOT show Admin tab
Delete lead requires authentication (401 without token)
action_items: LOW: Add data-testid='import-xls-btn' to Import XLS button for automated testing

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All core flows verified, minor data-testid attribute missing

seed_data_creation: 53 leads assigned to Benjamin - breakdown: 22 SALE, 20 PENDING, 11 LOST
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified the CRM with new admin credentials. Admin: bsanchezcar@gmail.com/Benja123 (admin role, uses @gmail.com domain). Salesperson: benjamin@fshac.com/test123. Data shows correctly: 53 leads total (22 SALE, 20 PENDING, 11 LOST). Revenue $216,906. Admin Panel shows comparison stats and user management. All tabs work: Dashboard, Follow-ups, Data, Admin (admin only). Registration accepts both @fshac.com and @gmail.com domains.

features_verified.role_based_tabs: Working - Admin tab only for admins
